chapter_title: About the Desirability of Company and

hadith_entries.text:
497. Narrated by Ibn Omar The Prophet
said: “If the
people knew what I know about traveling alone, then nobody
would travel alone at night." (Bukhari)

498. Narrated Abdullah ibn Amr: 'The Messenger of
Allah said: "The individual traveler is a devil. The two
travelers are two devils. And the three travelers are a
cavalcade." (At-Termizi)
